---
title: "Isoline"
execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: false
  output: true
  warning: false
  error: true
  include: true
---

{{< include src/00_libs.qmd >}}
{{< include src/00_utils.qmd >}}

```{ojs}
config = ({
  cell: { width: 18, height: 100 },
  person: { width: 10, height: 100 }
})
persPerLine = Math.floor(width / config.cell.width) - 1
highlightCount = Math.round(persPerLine * highlight)
alphabet = "abcdefghilmnopqSBDEGHIJKLNOPRSTVWXYZ"
```

<!-- <p class="testIcons">" abcdefghilmnopqSBDEGHIJKLNOPRSTVWXYZ "<p> -->

```{ojs}
renderPerson = (p, params = {}) => {
  const { personDims = config.person } = params;
  const fillColor = p.highlight ? "steelblue" : "#ddd";
  const strokeColor = "#fff";

  // Render the stroke and body separately for cleaner outline
  return svg`
    <g class="person">
      <text baseline-shift="-${personDims.height}px" 
        style="font-size: ${personDims.height}px; font-family: Isotype"
        fill="${fillColor}"
        stroke="${strokeColor}"
        stroke-width="3">
        ${p.avatar}
      </text>

    <text baseline-shift="-${personDims.height}px" 
      style="font-size: ${personDims.height}px; font-family: Isotype;"
      fill="${fillColor}">
        ${p.avatar}
    </text>
    </g>
  `;
}
```

```{ojs}
generatePerson = seed => {
  const avatarChoices = alphabet;
  const id = "person_" + d3.format("0>4")(seed);
  // Choose a letter for the avatar based on a hash of the ID
  const avatar =
    avatarChoices[parseInt(md5(id).slice(0, 2), 16) % avatarChoices.length];
  return {
    id,
    avatar,
    highlight: seed < highlightCount ? true : false
  };
}
```

```{ojs}
viewof highlight = slider({
  // title: "Highlight (%)",
  min: 0,
  max: 1,
  step: 0.01,
  format: ".0%",
  value: 0.3,
  // description: "How many percent of the bar should we highlight?"
})
```

```{ojs}
viz = {
  const people = d3.range(persPerLine).map(generatePerson);
  const cellWidth = config.cell.width;
  const height = 120;

  return html`
  <svg width="${width}" height="${height}">
    <g transform="translate(0, 100)">
      ${people.map(
        (p, i) => svg`
        <g transform="translate(${i * cellWidth}, 0)">
          ${renderPerson(p)}
        </g>`
      )}
    </g>
  </svg>
`;
}
```

```{ojs}
minibar = {
  const div = d3
    .create('div')
    .attr('id', 'bar')
    .style('transform', `translate(0,-20px)`);

  while (true) {
    const children = div
      .selectAll('.children')
      .data([highlight * 100, 100 - highlight * 100]);

    const enter = children
      .enter()
      .append('div')
      .attr('class', 'children')
      .style('width', d => `${d}%`)
      .style('transition', 'width 0.5s')
      .style('background-color', (d, i) => (i === 0 ? "steelblue" : "#ddd"))
      .append('span')
      .style('transform', `translate(0,30px)`)
      .style('color', (d, i) => (i === 0 ? "steelblue" : "#ddd"))
      .style('font-family', 'Jost')
      .html(d => `${Math.round(d)}%`);

    const exit = children.exit().remove();

    children.merge(children).style('width', d => `${d}%`);

    yield div.node();
  }
}
```
